purpose: Central registry for data folder schemas and versions. Agents should read this first.

admin.description: Hourly folder listing cache for notification-control-panel-web.html

benchmarks.description: Market indices P/E, P/B, ROE - 31,558 records, 2010-01-01 ~ 2026-06-21, 37 sections, 860 S&P 500 data points + source_summaries for price/EPS/PER/PBR/ROE

damodaran.description: Industry valuation data, extended US metrics, non-US regional metrics, ERP, credit ratings

global-scouter.description: Stock screening (1,066), ETFs (23), indicators (1,064), raw preservation files (9) + FY+1~FY+3 forward/revision extensions

indices.description: S&P 500 and NASDAQ daily price history (1980-present, 46 years)

macro.description: Macro banking, liquidity, and monthly activity survey series: 924 activity records, OECD CLI through 2026-04, PMI/ISM through 2026-05

sec-13f.description: Institutional holdings from 60 tracked investors across 30 quarters; 57 current 2026-Q1 cohort investors, 14 analytics files, local YF enrichment, passive/institutional cohorts, and stale-investor exclusion.

yardney.description: Moody's corporate spread to Bond PER to S&P 500 fair value model - 1,872 records through 2026-06-05.

computed.description: Deterministic computed signals and normalized market facts derived from macro, sentiment, Yahoo, StockAnalysis, and SlickCharts data.

calendar.description: Verified USD macro, Fed policy, filing, and market calendar events mirrored from BujaBot Google Calendar.

yf.description: Ticker-level quote, financial statement, holder, analyst, event, history, and quarter-close payloads used by Stock, Screener, Portfolio, and ETF surfaces.

stockanalysis.source: StockAnalysis public JSON, Svelte/devalue payloads, and HTML tables
stockanalysis.description: ETF holdings, ETF metadata, quote/history cross-checks, stock financial statement candidates, stock overview snapshots, and market event surfaces.

edgar-korean-summaries.source: SEC EDGAR + feno-edgar Korean summary artifacts
edgar-korean-summaries.description: Ticker availability index, ticker-level Korean SEC filing summary manifests, and generated summary artifacts. Current coverage: NVDA 2026 Form 10-K pilot.

edgar.description: Normalized SEC ticker-to-CIK cache used by the EDGAR filing timeline builder.

recent_changes.change: Weekly update (2026-06-19 source) + DEC-275 history-preservation merge: 31,558 records, 2010-01-01 ~ 2026-06-21, 37 sections, 860 S&P 500 data points. The source trimmed the window to 2010-08-06; the converter now merges prior output (source-wins overlap + floor-only preserve + ISO-week grid guard) to restore and hold the 2010-01-01 floor. dup_section_weeks=0 across all files.

Weekly data refresh (2026-06-19 source): 1,066 stocks, 1,064 indicators (+1), 23 ETFs, per_bands 98.3% (1,048), 9 raw files; rebuilt stocks_analyzer/per_bands_index/slick_index and revision_movers (up 12/down 12).

Expanded 13F universe from 30 to 60 investors, added passive/institutional cohorts including BlackRock/Vanguard/State Street and active managers, rebuilt 30-quarter output through 2026-Q1, published 77 public JSON files and 14 analytics files. Current-quarter analytics use 57 non-stale investors; einhorn, scion, and vanguard are stale-excluded.
Weekly data update (2026-06-12 source): 31,521 records (+1,080), 2010-01-01 ~ 2026-06-14, 37 sections, 859 S&P 500 data points; source_summaries 2,353 non-null + 52 null preserved.
Data refresh (2026-06-12 source): 1,066 stock detail files, 1,063 indicators (+1), per_bands 98.3%, 9 raw files. Existing v2.2/v2.3 fields remain backward compatible.

Weekly append from Yardeni model workbook: 5 records added, total 1,872 records, date range 1990-02-02 ~ 2026-06-05, latest fair value 6,284.32 and premium +17.49%; 18 historical source revisions detected and existing values preserved.
Weekly data refresh (2026-06-05 source): 30,441 records (+1), 2010-07-23 ~ 2026-06-05, 37 sections, 829 S&P 500 data points, hang_seng_tech +1.
Data refresh (2026-06-05 source): 1,066 stock detail files, 1,062 indicators (+1), per_bands 98.3%, 9 raw files. Existing v2.2/v2.3 fields remain backward compatible.

PMI partial-input append from 2026-05 workbooks: 5 records added, total 924 records; manufacturing/services PMI and ISM components through 2026-05, OECD CLI preserved through 2026-04; 1 historical ISM manufacturing source revision detected and preserved.

Regional valuation expansion: 6 JSON files, added industry_metrics_regions.json with 7 non-US regions x 17 datasets including regional PE/PB/PS, and switched credit ratings to official XLS dynamic parsing without fallback.
Weekly data update (2026-05-29 source): 30,440 records (+1), 2010-07-16 ~ 2026-05-29, 37 sections, 829 S&P 500 data points
Data refresh (2026-05-29 source): 1,066 stock detail files (+1), 1,061 indicators (+1), per_bands 98.2%, 9 raw files. Existing v2.2/v2.3 fields remain backward compatible.
Weekly data update (2026-05-22 source): 30,439 records (+1), 2010-07-09 ~ 2026-05-22, 37 sections, 829 data points per index

Backward-compatible summaries expansion: 1W price momentum plus source_summaries for px_last, best_eps, best_pe_ratio, px_to_book_ratio, and roe across 37 benchmark sections (2,353 non-null values + 52 null placeholders). Source data remains 2026-05-15.

Raw preservation upgrade + data refresh (2026-05-22 source): 1,065 stock detail files, 1,060 indicators, 9 raw files covering A_Company, M_Company, S_Valuation, T_EPS C, T_Growth C, M_ETFs, A_ETFs, and workbook inventory. Existing v2.2 fields remain backward compatible.
Weekly data update (2026-05-15 source): 30,438 records (+1), 2010-07-02 ~ 2026-05-15, 37 sections, 829 data points per index

v3.4.0 converter fix cycle + full rebuild: per-filing SEC value-unit normalization (thousands/dollars 1000x understatement fixed for pre-2023 quarters and Druckenmiller), all 30 CIK→entity mappings audited and 2 corrected (Laffont→Coatue, Klarman→Baupost), case-insensitive .xml discovery, 13F-HR/A amendment merge, holdings_count schema split (reported_holdings_count + filtered_out_count), stale-investor exclusion from current-quarter analytics. 30 investors, 43 public JSON files; verify EXIT=0.
Data refresh (2026-05-15 source): 1,065 stocks, 1,059 indicators (+1), per_bands 98.3%

Q1 2026 SEC 13F refresh: 30 tracked investors, 29 quarters covered where filed, 43 public JSON files, 10 analytics files; full rebuild with Yahoo enrichment disabled. Configured Greenlight/Einhorn CIK remains stale after 2023-Q4.
Added activity-surveys.json first full-history load: OECD CLI, major-country manufacturing/services PMI, and ISM components; 919 monthly records across 5 datasets.
Weekly data update (2026-05-08 source): 30,437 records (+1), 2010-06-25 ~ 2026-05-08, 37 sections, 829 data points per index
Data refresh (2026-05-08 source): 1,065 stocks (-1), 1,058 indicators (+1), per_bands 98.3%; stale detail files removed from deployed output

Weekly append from 2026-05-04 workbook: 5 records added (2026-04-03 ~ 2026-05-01), total 1,867 records, latest fair value 6,015.64, premium +20.19%; 13 historical source revisions detected and preserved
Weekly data update (2026-05-01 source): 30,436 records (+1), 2010-06-18 ~ 2026-05-01, 37 sections, 829 data points per index
Data refresh (2026-05-01 source): 1,066 stocks, 1,057 indicators (+1), per_bands 98.4%

Data refresh (2026-04-24 source): 1,066 stocks, 1,056 indicators (+1), per_bands 98.4%

Data refresh (2026-03-20 source): 1,062 stocks (-1), 1,052 indicators, per_bands 98.1%

Bug #318 fix: per-quarter independent data rebuild. Parser cache key fix + backfill default=full. 30 investors × 20Q verified.
Promoted FRED banking + FDIC Tier1 root JSON into manifest category with dual-write compatibility path

v3.2.0 sync: enrichment metadata added (sector/cap/filing-return coverage + source mix), analytics expanded 4->8

Major update: 17→30 investors, 20Q accumulate mode, analytics/ folder (consensus, new_positions, buying_pressure, conviction)

516 individual stock files in stocks/ subfolder

agent_instructions.on_session_start: Read this manifest to understand current data structure
agent_instructions.on_schema_change: Update folder schema.json AND this manifest recent_changes
agent_instructions.on_new_file: Add to folder schema.json files section
